list.name: Changes
list.comment: Improve task filters and visuals: update global styles, add subtask badge, and enhance task filter options

task.summary: Default task
feat: add authentication context and integrate login/logout functionality
feat: add bank logo assets

feat: implement finance management pages and UI components
Add reusable UI components for dialogs and cards, integrate finance management pages for bank accounts and cards with data fetching and creation functionalities, and enhance navigation structure for seamless user experience.

refactor: modularize finance management components
Extract shared components for finance management into reusable modules, replace generic page implementation with specific components for bank accounts and cards, and improve overall structure for better maintainability.

feat: add update functionality for finance detail pages
Introduce functionality to update bank accounts and cards in `FinanceDetalhePage`, enhance user flow with editable fields and institution selection, and integrate backend update APIs.

feat: enhance bank account detail page with editable fields and institution selection
Introduce editable fields for bank account names and institution selection modal. Add loading and error handling states, integrate toast notifications for updates, and simplify page structure for improved user experience.

feat: enhance bank account detail page with editable fields and institution selection
Introduce editable fields for bank account names and institution selection modal. Add loading and error handling states, integrate toast notifications for updates, and simplify page structure for improved user experience.

feat: add filters and data table for bank transactions
Introduce filtering functionality with `CategoriaCombobox` and `ContaBancariaLancamentosFiltros` components. Implement a responsive table in `ContaBancariaTabTabela` to display filtered transactions. Include pagination controls, skeleton loading states, and error handling for enhanced user experience.

feat: add calendar and date picker components for enhanced filtering
Introduce `Calendar` component integrating `react-day-picker` for customizable date selection. Add `FiltroDatePicker` for improved filtering in `ContaBancariaLancamentosFiltros`. Update transaction table with totals for received and debit values. Enhance user experience with date formatting and dependency updates.

feat: add components for credit card management and transaction listing
Introduce credit card management components, including `CartaoLancamentosFiltros`, `CartaoTabTabela`, and `CartaoTabDashboard`. Add OFX import functionality with `CartaoOfxModal` for transaction handling. Enhance credit card detail page with editable fields, institution selection, transaction filtering, and tabbed navigation for a better user experience. Update documentation and extend service types to support new features.

feat: update credit card filters to support statement-based filtering
Replace year/month filters with a unified statement filter in `CartaoLancamentosFiltros`. Integrate fatura listing with `listarFaturasUnicas` and adapt the user interface for improved usability. Update related service methods and documentation to reflect the new behavior. Simplify total calculations and refactor table components for enhanced readability.

feat: add installment column to credit card transactions table
Include a new "Parcelas" column in `CartaoTabTabela` to display installment details. Update service types to support installment data (`parcelamento`, `parcelas`, `parcela_atual`) and adjust table rendering logic accordingly.

feat: add transaction list refresh on OFX import
Introduce a transaction update mechanism triggered on successful OFX import in `CartaoOfxModal`. Enhance `CartaoTabTabela` to re-fetch data based on a new refresh parameter. Adjust related components and services to support the updated flow.

feat: improve credit card filters with collapsible UI and month/year filtering
Introduce collapsible filters in `CartaoLancamentosFiltros` for a cleaner user interface. Replace single "fatura" field with separate month and year filters, supported by a new `Popover` interaction. Enhance usability with a toggle for showing/hiding filters and refactor logic to align with updated design.
Remove `configuracoes-page.tsx` and related components
add doc
Add project management components, structure, and API integration
Update workspace metadata and tasks to reflect recent project restructuring
Add modals for creating and editing tasks and subtasks with form validation
Update task views to improve layout, typography, and accessibility
Refactor task status styles into a reusable function and integrate it across task views.
Improve task filters and visuals: update global styles, add subtask badge, and enhance task filter options

MESSAGE.value: feat: add authentication context and integrate login/logout functionality
feat: add bank logo assets

feat: implement finance management pages and UI components
Add reusable UI components for dialogs and cards, integrate finance management pages for bank accounts and cards with data fetching and creation functionalities, and enhance navigation structure for seamless user experience.

refactor: modularize finance management components
Extract shared components for finance management into reusable modules, replace generic page implementation with specific components for bank accounts and cards, and improve overall structure for better maintainability.

feat: add update functionality for finance detail pages
Introduce functionality to update bank accounts and cards in `FinanceDetalhePage`, enhance user flow with editable fields and institution selection, and integrate backend update APIs.

feat: add OFX import modal for bank accounts
Introduce `ContaOfxModal` component to handle OFX file imports for bank accounts, including file processing, category editing, and transaction saving. Update related documentation and enhance npm dependencies for development.

feat: enhance bank account detail page with editable fields and institution selection
Introduce editable fields for bank account names and institution selection modal. Add loading and error handling states, integrate toast notifications for updates, and simplify page structure for improved user experience.

feat: add filters and data table for bank transactions
Introduce filtering functionality with `CategoriaCombobox` and `ContaBancariaLancamentosFiltros` components. Implement a responsive table in `ContaBancariaTabTabela` to display filtered transactions. Include pagination controls, skeleton loading states, and error handling for enhanced user experience.

feat: add calendar and date picker components for enhanced filtering
Introduce `Calendar` component integrating `react-day-picker` for customizable date selection. Add `FiltroDatePicker` for improved filtering in `ContaBancariaLancamentosFiltros`. Update transaction table with totals for received and debit values. Enhance user experience with date formatting and dependency updates.

feat: add components for credit card management and transaction listing
Introduce credit card management components, including `CartaoLancamentosFiltros`, `CartaoTabTabela`, and `CartaoTabDashboard`. Add OFX import functionality with `CartaoOfxModal` for transaction handling. Enhance credit card detail page with editable fields, institution selection, transaction filtering, and tabbed navigation for a better user experience. Update documentation and extend service types to support new features.

feat: update credit card filters to support statement-based filtering
Replace year/month filters with a unified statement filter in `CartaoLancamentosFiltros`. Integrate fatura listing with `listarFaturasUnicas` and adapt the user interface for improved usability. Update related service methods and documentation to reflect the new behavior. Simplify total calculations and refactor table components for enhanced readability.

feat: add installment column to credit card transactions table
Include a new "Parcelas" column in `CartaoTabTabela` to display installment details. Update service types to support installment data (`parcelamento`, `parcelas`, `parcela_atual`) and adjust table rendering logic accordingly.

feat: add transaction list refresh on OFX import
Introduce a transaction update mechanism triggered on successful OFX import in `CartaoOfxModal`. Enhance `CartaoTabTabela` to re-fetch data based on a new refresh parameter. Adjust related components and services to support the updated flow.

feat: add parcelas tab and payment history for credit cards
Introduce the `CartaoTabParcelas` component to display active credit card installments and their details. Add functionality to view payment history per installment through a dialog. Update services to fetch installment and payment data and enhance the credit card detail page with a new "Parcelas" tab for improved user workflow.

feat: improve credit card filters with collapsible UI and month/year filtering
Introduce collapsible filters in `CartaoLancamentosFiltros` for a cleaner user interface. Replace single "fatura" field with separate month and year filters, supported by a new `Popover` interaction. Enhance usability with a toggle for showing/hiding filters and refactor logic to align with updated design.
Remove `configuracoes-page.tsx` and related components
add doc
Add project management components, structure, and API integration
Update workspace metadata and tasks to reflect recent project restructuring
Add modal components for task creation, editing, and subtask creation
Add modals for creating and editing tasks and subtasks with form validation
Update task views to improve layout, typography, and accessibility
Refactor task status styles into a reusable function and integrate it across task views.
Improve task filters and visuals: update global styles, add subtask badge, and enhance task filter options

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: Improve task filters and visuals: update global styles, add subtask badge, and enhance task filter options
